title: Error Handling
description: ErrorBoundary and catchError catch errors in reactive computations and child components.
error_boundary_intro: ErrorBoundary catches errors thrown in its children and renders a fallback:
catch_error_intro: For lower-level control, catchError wraps a function and catches errors in child computations:
error_propagation_body: Errors propagate up the owner chain. If no error boundary catches an error, it bubbles to the root and throws. Nested error boundaries catch errors from their subtree only.
handler_errors_intro: useAsyncOutput handlers run in the runtime's async deployment loop, not inside reactive computations. Errors thrown in handlers cause the deployment to fail. They are not caught by ErrorBoundary. Handle errors inside your handler with try/catch:
warning_cleanup: Cleanup functions registered with onCleanup still run when an error boundary catches an error. Resources are released.
